title: Karlos Mink's Pizza dies before he could find the cure!
description:
Round 7 of Poop Tennis with Captpan6

Just a recap everyone... there are NO winners so stop sending me hate mail just because you like Pan's better, this whole choosing sides crap starts lots of spam and hate and I think its just irritating so please stop saying "I can't choose" or "You're gonna win" 

I hope you enjoy this round!
